message:
Add reduced SVD support via svd_full(full_matrices) parameter

Introduce svd_full() method that accepts a full_matrices boolean flag,
matching numpy.linalg.svd semantics. When false, returns truncated
U (m x k) and Vt (k x n) matrices where k = min(m, n). The existing
svd() method becomes a convenience wrapper calling svd_full(true).
Add tests for both wide (3x5) and tall (5x2) reduced SVD cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
